steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The word though signals a contrast: high altitude studies are one way, below sea level studies received 'comparatively little notice.' The blank must describe high altitude research in a way that opposes 'little notice.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — abundant: means plentiful — directly contrasts 'little notice.' ✓
  • Choice B — equivocal: means ambiguous — describes quality, not quantity. ✗
  • Choice C — sporadic: means scattered — implies scarcity, not abundance. ✗
  • Choice D — preliminary: means incomplete — says nothing about quantity. ✗
A is correct.
